Notes: MCU. Copy RP2040 minimal reference design. Extended part.
Boot flash (firmware lives here). Basic/common.
Core clock. Basic. Load caps C_Y1a/b.
LED drivers, daisy-chained. Extended part (1 line = both).
Switch inputs, daisy-chained.
Data storage (optional). Pick a JLCPCB-library SMD socket.
3.3V logic rail from USB-C #1 VBUS. Basic.
3.3V LED anode rail from USB-C #2 VBUS (keeps drivers cool).
Power + data to the Pi. 2x CC resistors + 2x D series R.
Dedicated LED power only (VBUS+GND+CC). No data lines.
Data-toggle bank header (8 sig + 3V3 + GND). Side entry.
Command-switch bank header (4 sig + rail + spare). Side entry.
Debug/reflash (optional). Can be pads only.
SW1=BOOTSEL, SW2=RUN/reset.
No series resistors (TLC5947 is constant-current). Check PCBA type is not Standard-Only if you want Economic.
USB-C CC pulldowns: 2 per connector (J1,J2).
USB D+/D- series resistors (J1 data only).
TLC5947 IREF (sets per-LED current ~15mA; raise R to lower current/heat).
Pull-ups: SD CS+data (4), command-switch inputs (4), spares (2).
Per-IC decoupling (RP2040 needs several, TLC5947 x2, 165 x2, flash, SD, regs).
RP2040 core (1.1V) decoupling + SD socket local.
Bulk on 3.3V logic, LED rail, and USB VBUS.
Crystal load caps (tune to crystal spec).
